steps.title: Convert the percentage to a multiplier
steps.content: The phrase 200% of means we multiply by the decimal equivalent of 200%. So Noah's collection is 2 times (or twice) the size of Priya's collection.

steps.title: Calculate Noah's sticker count
steps.content:
Multiply Priya's sticker count by the multiplier we found:
$$\text{Noah's stickers} = 2 \times 520 = 1040$$
That confirms C is correct.
